fixes_applied.description: Added TODO comment to trigger pause plan action before verifying paused state. The test case requires the pause action to be performed, not just verified. Added placeholder comment for actual pause plan trigger method.

Removed UI verification code from Step 10 that belongs in Step 11. Removed lines: complimentary_value = page.locator(...) and expect(complimentary_value).to_contain_text("6", timeout=30000). Step 10 now only verifies print job registration via API.

Removed UI verification code from Step 12 that belongs in Step 13. Removed lines: complimentary_value = page.locator(...) and expect(complimentary_value).to_contain_text("10", timeout=30000). Step 12 now only verifies print job registration via API.

Replaced assert statement with expect() for tooltip text verification in Step 7. Changed from: tooltip_text = complimentary_tooltip.text_content(); assert len(tooltip_text) > 0 and "complimentary" in tooltip_text.lower() to: expect(complimentary_tooltip).to_contain_text("complimentary", timeout=10000)

Replaced assert statement with expect() for info message verification in Step 9. Changed from: info_message_text = complimentary_info_message.text_content(); assert len(info_message_text) > 0 to: expect(complimentary_info_message).not_to_be_empty(timeout=30000)
Added logging for complimentary progress bar color value in Step 11. Added: framework_logger.info(f"Complimentary progress bar color: {bar_color}") after color evaluation for better debugging.
Added logging for additional progress bar color value in Step 14. Added: framework_logger.info(f"Additional progress bar color: {bar_color}") after color evaluation for better debugging.

Replaced assert statement with expect() for additional tooltip verification in Step 16. Changed from: tooltip_text = additional_tooltip.text_content(); assert len(tooltip_text) > 0 to: expect(additional_tooltip).not_to_be_empty(timeout=10000)

Replaced assert statement with expect() for additional info message verification in Step 17. Changed from: blocks_message_text = additional_info_message.text_content(); assert "block" in blocks_message_text.lower() or "bought" in blocks_message_text.lower() to: expect(additional_info_message).to_contain_text("block", timeout=30000)
Added logging for progress bar width comparison in Step 18. Added: framework_logger.info(f"Progress bar width: {bar_width}, parent width: {parent_width}") after width evaluation for better debugging.
